deals.title: if you’re in vienna this saturday, be here 🌞 SOUL

deals.title: 50% OFF your entire order 📍 Potato Factory – Tyson’
deals.description: 🎉 GRAND OPENING PARTY 🎉 This Saturday | 5 PM – 9 PM 🔥 🎧 Live DJ 🍦 Free Ice Cream for Everyone 🎁 First 100 customers after 5 PM get a FREE item! 🔥 From 5 PM until closing: 50% OFF your entire order 📍 Potato Factory – Tyson’s Corner Bring your friends and celebrate with us! 🥔🍔🔥 #PotatoFactory #GrandOpening #TysonsCorner #DMVFood #FoodTrailer Quelle: TikTok @potatofactoryva.

deals.title: 🚨 LAST DAY
deals.description: 🚨 LAST DAY! 🚨 FREE Thai Tea giveaway ends tonight! 🧋🔥 ❌ Burtonsville is FULL ✅ Arlington & Union Market still have winner spots available Don’t miss your chance, get those screenshots in before it’s over! 👀⏰ 🚚 Food Truck📍Vienna @ TSC 11am-1:30pm - Private For Staff Only 📍 15707 Old Columbia Pike, Burtonsville, MD @burtonsville_crossing ⏰ Sun-Thurs 11am-9pm, Friday-Sat 11am-10pm 📍 1309 5th St NE Washington, DC @unionmarketdc ⏰ Sun-Thurs 11am-8pm, Friday-Sat 11am-9pm 📍 1731 Crystal Dr. A

deals.title: Gratis Eintritt bei @venyou.event
deals.description: Donaukanal is calling. VENYOU Open Air Dayparty edition. Open sky, free entry. Sounds by Tanju, Romanic, Kussi and Mike Slemp. OPEN AIR AM DONAUKANAL SAT / JUNE 06 4PM TO 10PM FREE ENTRY FRÄULEINS DONAUKANAL / 1010 VIENNA #openairvienna #dayparty #donaukanal #viennaevents #viennasummer Quelle: TikTok @venyou.event.

deals.title: @frishwienxtra Angebot
deals.description: Im Juni warten 2 Termine auf euch und das natürlich kostenlos und beide Termine finden im altbekannten Sigmund-Freud-Park statt. 🌳 Schreibt uns in die Kommentare, bei welchem Screening wir euch treffen können! 😊🍿 #frishwienxtra #openair #sunsetcinema #openairkino #kostenlos Quelle: TikTok @frishwienxtra.
